title: Executive Order 10462—Delegation of Certain Functions of the President to the Housing and Home Finance Administrator

flags.justification: A narrow, single-function delegation under the general delegation-authorization statute (3 U.S.C. §301), a routine administrative housekeeping order.
A functional delegation, not a compliance regime.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A standing delegation for an ongoing statutory function.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
No second agency's competing mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.

notes: Validation batch (negative). Structural weight: 0/10 = 0.0%. One of many similar routine delegation orders issued early in the Eisenhower administration as it organized its executive branch.
